tasks.name: Verify Config CRUD
tasks.prompt:
Test the configuration API routes by making actual API calls.

Tests:
1. curl http://localhost:7890/api/config/paths
2. curl http://localhost:7890/api/config/agents
3. curl http://localhost:7890/api/config/skills
4. curl http://localhost:7890/api/config/hooks
5. Create a test agent via PUT
6. Delete the test agent via DELETE

Report any API errors or missing functionality.

tasks.name: Verify Workspace Run
tasks.prompt:
Test workspace API routes by making API calls.

Tests:
1. curl http://localhost:7890/api/workspace/repos
2. Create a simple test task
3. Run the test task
4. Verify it appears in logs

Report any issues found.

tasks.name: Verify Pipeline Visualization
tasks.prompt:
Test the pipeline visualization in the browser.

Tests:
1. Navigate to http://localhost:7890/#/pipelines
2. Check that pipeline cards show stages
3. Click a pipeline to see train visualization
4. Verify SSE connection works (check browser console)

Report any UI issues found.
